applicability: Applies to the reported thermally grown SiO2 released-membrane experiment on a silicon frame. It is source-documented context only and must not be generalized to different oxides, release geometries, thermal histories, holders, or acceptance criteria without validation.
method_summary: Published source describing micro-machined released SiO2 membranes, measured membrane profiles, and simulation-inferred residual-stress estimates. No raw profile, simulation, or stress-inversion files are stored in this repository.
public_summary: The published experiment reports released thermally grown SiO2 membrane profiles across three square side lengths and simulation-inferred compressive residual-stress estimates. This is literature evidence, not an independently reproduced Diamond Thermal Lab result.
review_notes: Draft literature transcription pending final human review.

source.reference: arXiv:2305.15794; C. Malhaire et al.; Determination of compressive stress in thin films using micro-machined buckled membranes; 2023

title: Literature source for released thermally grown SiO2 membrane profile and stress evidence
uncertainty_summary: Reported values are literature-transcribed. The repository has no raw measurement or simulation-inversion files. The source estimates method-level relative error below approximately 5 percent; this is not an independent Diamond Thermal Lab uncertainty certificate.
